description.value:
Prerequisite: Dex 19, Improved Two-Weapon Defense, Two-Weapon Defense, Two-Weapon Fighting, base attack bonus +11.

Benefit: When wielding two weapons (not including natural weapons or unarmed strikes), you gain a +3 shield bonus to your AC. When you are fighting defensively or using the total defense action, this shield bonus increases to +6.
description.summary: When wielding two weapons (not including natural weapons or unarmed strikes), you gain a +3 shield bonus to your AC.…
